sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented. Puzzle game with falling blob mechanics, sub-pixel precision not relevant to gameplay.

special_mechanics.name: Blob Drop & Rotation
special_mechanics.description: Groups of two colored blobs fall from top of screen. Player rotates and moves blobs before they touch bottom or existing pile.

special_mechanics.name: Chain Reaction
special_mechanics.description: Matching colored blobs (4+ touching horizontally/vertically) disappear. Blobs above fall to fill space. Consecutive chains trigger.

special_mechanics.name: Rock Fall Penalty
special_mechanics.description: Successful chain reactions cause rocks to fall on opponent's screen based on blob count and consecutive chain reactions.

physics_values.scaling: proportional to chain length and blob count

tier_notes: Tier 2: Puzzle game with no character movement or physics-based platforming. Player actions are rotation and horizontal positioning of falling blobs. Wikipedia source provides only gameplay mechanics overview, not physics parameters. Movement physics extraction not applicable to puzzle genre.
